meta.title: Nation State ICS Attack On A Budget
meta.description:
Monta Elkins shows in detail how he modified a Cisco Firewall by adding his own micro controller to grab control at boot, and add his own firewall rules, and change config so the attacker is allowed through the firewall.

This is a supply chain, highly targeted attack that is typically described as a nation state attack. Monta is not a nation state, and it cost less than $500 including tools, and it is difficult to find.
